headings.usage: Page titles, card headers, triage numbers

body.usage: General descriptive text, AI recommendation text

data_numerics.usage: ALL numeric values, SKU IDs, prices, margins, dates

rules: No rounded corners on main structural elements (use rounded-none or rounded-sm max).
Expose the grid: 1px subtle borders (border-[#262626]) separating all rows and columns.
High contrast semantic colors for financial deltas (red/green).
Zero drop shadows. Flat, stark, data-first.

layout_and_spacing.density: Info-dense. Use tight padding (p-3) inside SKU rows to maximize vertical screen real estate.
layout_and_spacing.sku_list: flex flex-col gap-2 (not grid). Each SKU is a horizontal row.
layout_and_spacing.sku_card_grid: Internal CSS grid (grid-cols-12 gap-4) ensuring perfect vertical column alignment across all rows.

triage_bar.description: Sticky top bar with 3 clickable filter pills.
triage_bar.styles: flex gap-2 mb-6 border-b border-[#262626] pb-4 sticky top-0 bg-[#050505] z-50
triage_bar.pill_styles: px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium border border-[#262626] text-[#8B8B96] transition-colors hover:text-white cursor-pointer

sku_row.description: Dense horizontal row showing SKU data.
sku_row.styles: grid grid-cols-12 gap-4 items-center p-3 border border-[#262626] bg-[#111111] transition-colors hover:bg-[#1A1A1A]
columns: col-span-2: Current vs Comp Price (red/green delta)
col-span-2: Buy Box Status + Margin Floor

ai_recommendation.icon: Use Sparkles icon (Lucide) in #007AFF to indicate AI.

action_button.description: Apply button that transitions to Repriced.
action_button.default_state: bg-[#007AFF] text-white px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-widest
action_button.repriced_state: bg-[#10B981]/20 text-[#10B981] px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-bold uppercase flex items-center gap-1

blocked_sku.content_override: Amber lock icon. Message: 'Competitor is pricing below your margin floor. No action possible — monitor for recovery.' No AI call. No Apply button.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Row backgrounds lighten slightly. Values remain high contrast.
motion_and_interactions.apply_transition: Use Framer Motion to swap Apply button with Repriced (Checkmark) with a quick scale and opacity transition (duration: 0.2s).
motion_and_interactions.loading: Fast, technical skeleton pulses (no soft fades, use sharp opacity toggles).

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Data Layer: Create an array of 8 hardcoded SKUs with id, brand, ourPrice, competitorPrice, buyBoxStatus, marginFloor, lastChanged. Make sure SKU-007 is configured as 'Blocked'.
2. Fonts: Import JetBrains Mono and Chivo via Google Fonts in index.css. Apply them according to typography guidelines.
3. State Management: Implement filtering logic for the Triage Bar (All, Action needed, Opportunity, Blocked).

4. AI Mock: Implement a mock asynchronous function for the AI recommendation to show the loading skeleton, then resolve to a single sentence string. Include a 10% chance to fail to demonstrate the retry error state.
5. Layout: Ensure strict column alignment. A table tag <table> is acceptable if grid-cols-12 gets tricky, but Tailwind grid-cols-12 on flex rows is preferred for custom padding.
6. Testing: ADD 'data-testid' to ALL interactive elements (triage pills, apply buttons, retry buttons).
7. Styling: Adhere strictly to the dark terminal aesthetics. Do NOT use soft shadows or rounded corners above sm. It must look like a high-end financial tool.
